emails.subject: Andy Zipper
emails.body: Should we request the LT-Option book to be attached to Andy Zipper? Any other books needed for him? Will he be allowed to trade all regions? Thanks, Stacey

emails.subject: Andy Zipper
emails.body: Should we request the LT-Option book to be attached to Andy Zipper? Any other books needed for him? Will he be allowed to trade all regions? Thanks, Stacey

emails.subject: RE: Andy Zipper
emails.body: RE: Andy Zipper Andy can trade all regions and all commodities (just like a desk head). He is replacing Harry.
